title: OCI Cross-Region Data Copy
description: Detects cross-region copy operations for boot volumes, block volumes, or object storage buckets. This could indicate data staging for exfiltration to a region outside organizational control.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.blockvolumes.copybootvolumeregion' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.blockvolumes.copyvolumeregion' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.objectstorage.copyobject' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.objectstorage.createreplicationpolicy')))
